issues.detail: Missing error handling for API calls and edge cases.
Platform-specific installation commands and dependencies limit cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: generate-single-short-video
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response A provides no content.

scenarios.name: batch-5-videos
scenarios.rationale: Response B is more detailed and closer to the rubric, though it still misses key requirements; Response A lacks most rubric elements.
